scripts.build: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); if (process.env.VERCEL === '1') { if (require('fs').existsSync('babel.config.js')) require('fs').unlinkSync('babel.config.js'); cp.spawnSync('npx', ['next', 'build'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); } else { cp.spawnSync('npx', ['next', 'build', '--webpack'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); }"
